description_long: This is a large, modern residential house enclosed within a rectangular walled yard. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and rooftop structures, including skylights and HVAC units. The exterior is primarily finished in a muted brown with white accents, and the building is surrounded by a landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs. The main entrance is marked by a prominent overhang and a set of steps, with large windows providing natural light to the interior. The property is bordered by a high wall with a central arched gateway, offering privacy and security. The overall design is clean and geometric, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with brown and white exterior, surrounded by a walled yard and landscaped with trees. The design features large windows, a prominent entryway, and a spacious, private lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an overhang, central arched gateway in the wall, and landscaped trees near the entry.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard area, additional trees, and a clearer view of the flat roof and rooftop structures.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, side yard, and a single tall tree near the wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the yard, three tall shrubs, and the house's geometric layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide overhang, steps, and large glass doors, framed by landscaping and a central arched gateway in the perimeter wall.
